audience: IT steering committee and HR leadership
goal: Present three integration approach options for Oracle HCM 26B and recommend the preferred path based on cost, risk, and timeline.

extensions.document_title: Oracle HCM 26B Integration Approach — Options Analysis for IT Steering Committee
extensions.one_sentence_thesis: Of the three integration approaches evaluated, the hybrid API-plus-HCM-Extract option offers the best balance of implementation speed, ongoing maintenance cost, and data fidelity for our org structure.
key_takeaways: Oracle HCM 26B introduces 14 new REST endpoints that simplify position management
Full API approach has lowest ongoing cost but highest upfront implementation effort
HCM Extract approach is fastest to deploy but creates data freshness lag of up to 24 hours
Hybrid approach balances real-time position data with batch payroll processing
Positions-vs-Jobs model change requires org structure migration before go-live
